sourceMovie.title: The Hate U Give
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto The Hate U Give (2018) as a crime theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The crime and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Hate U Give clicked for you, Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in crime and drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Hate U Give?
faq.answer: Try Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri, Freedom Writers, Boyz n the Hood—each shares DNA with The Hate U Give while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Hate U Give?
faq.answer: The Hate U Give (2018) is best described as Crime, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Hate U Give worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 8.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this crime lane.
